Pls ad blood and make it more realistic better bottle animations with the beer and please God PLEASE!! Add more maps and updates I know it working on dbf2 rn but pls just pls work on this. 
It was a masterpiece and people still play it like me just add more maps, blood maybe gore have better beer and bottle animations let us be able to see the beer in the bottles and have better smashing physics that's all I ask I know that's a lot but just please just come back and work on this one again.
Amazing better than 2

Maybe  add a new level/boss to spice it up, like a restaurant or a boxer? ps. who won the game first came out i was a little young but i wanted to get a vr really badly just so i could play this as well as a few other games and in my opinion this is the best game out of any of those games in terms of expectation and reality. i'd be lying if i said i haven't played this game a lot since i first got a psvr.

Is very fun for a few hours to a few days, after that it just gets really boring, it’s a decent game, but won’t blow anyone’s mind in my opinion.
I love the game but plz work on this bug when i grab someone they float to the ground and plz add more maps but other than that i love the game 😀😀😀👍👍 happy hallowe,en
Went inside drank a beer, argued with someone got into a fight. Then came home and played this game super fun.
Almost as good as bonelab I have the 2nd game and they are both good add multiplayer to the 2nd

reviews.review_title: Updates have turned it into a slog
reviews.review_description:
Bought this when it first came out years ago. Just writing a review now since I recently upgraded to a quest 3 and got back into VR and wanted to take a look at where I left off. 


The base game is solid and knows what it is. A goofy brawling game where you LARP a messy drunk throwing garbage around. I grew up in a pretty trashy area so there's some nostalgia bias. But it genuinely is pretty enjoyable. More so when you experiment with props in each area. I like the new maps they released as well. Airports , police stations, whatever. All places Ive mad an a** out of myself before. I know they have a sequel in early access, but if I had to make a suggestion, kid's party. I want to roleplay a sorry dad who throws up on the bounce house and lets out too much of his inner pain on the neighbor. 


Sounds good. But as is, I can't recommend it fully. No clue what happened. But the game runs terribly now. On quest 2 it is nearly unplayable. And Quest 3 just getting by while still looking super half baked is bizarre. Haven't tried it with quest optimizer. But the average person shouldn't need to do this. Please consider optimizing. That or just dump the PC assests if its just going to chug no matter what

I got this thinking it would be hilarious to play. It is KIND OF funny, but mostly gets monotonous after 10 minutes. There is no real goal except to beat up people. I thought there would have been challenges of some type. It’s just fighting. Looks cheap. And the controls are awful. And it’s just too easy. Not saying I want it to be overly difficult but at least somewhat of a challenge. I had moments where 5 people where trying to beat me up and I took them all down with a stool within 3 second. After 15 minutes I was done. Definitely not worth what they are asking.

This game is hilarious. It's super funny to play and even funnier with a lot of people. It would've EASILY be 5 stars, but the game has some problems. First of all, the performance. FPS feels pretty smooth when playing alone(around 60-75FPS), but it gets pretty bad when you play multiplayer (lowest I''ve got is like 20FPS), second of all, it has a lot of bugs and third of all, it seems that most of the community has just died and the developers haven't updated the game in a WHILE. Overall, definitely my second favourite game in my library right now, right behind BoneLab of course.
Fun for like one hour , bad quality , fighting with people isn’t also the best in this game , throwing stuff works horrible
